Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Varic Vallenar]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 1''' — Varic's full name is Varic Vallenar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 2''' — Varic is the son of Benri Vallenar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 2''' — Varic gained the results of five extra lives of magical training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 2''' — Varic gained memories along with magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 2''' — Varic believes the Aether thought he needed to live six lives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 2''' — Varic possesses telekinesis.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 2''' — Varic can levitate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 2''' — Varic wears a white jumpsuit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 2''' — Varic intends to save the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 2''' — Varic has dull silver eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — Varic Vallenar is the son of Benri Vallenar and has stolen a priceless magical artifact from him twice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — Varic is working on behalf of the Vallenar Corporation to stop the creation of a new Iron Legion King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — Varic Vallenar is a licensed Archmage and former heir to the Vallenar Corporation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 4''' — Varic Vallenar is a Professor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 4''' — Vallenar is the name of the protagonist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 6''' — Varic Vallenar is an Archmage mentioned in Subline news articles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 6''' — Varic Vallenar is a human with modified silver eyes and silver hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 8''' — The console at the mountain's base identified Varic Vallenar as having access.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Varic Vallenar uses a wand to cast spells.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Varic Vallenar was a prize fighter on Visiria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Varic Vallenar was trained in water magic by a fighter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Varic Vallenar uses a wand and a staff named Eurias.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Varic Vallenar uses a levitation ring.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Varic Vallenar uses a Lightcaster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Varic Vallenar can cast Absolute Burial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Varic Vallenar uses a mantle for protection.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Varic Vallenar uses an overloaded shield amulet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — Varic Vallenar is the Captain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — Varic Vallenar is an accomplished wizard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 19''' — Varic Vallenar is a Union-certified Archmage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 20''' — Varic is someone who can put up barriers quickly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — Varic can use magic to alert Hives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — Professor Vallenar is an elementalist and a binding magic expert.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 23''' — Varic's summoned rabbits act like war-hounds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 23''' — Varic's summoned rabbits have bodies that act like digital avatars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 24''' — Professor Vallenar is an instructor at the Magic Tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 25''' — Varic Vallenar won a Zenith Starship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 25''' — Varic Vallenar is the owner of a ship that Omega intended to steal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 28''' — Varic is aboard Sola's ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 28''' — Varic is the son of Benri Vallenar and has been recognized as Captain of The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 28''' — Benri and Varic previously proved the Mirror of Silence's capabilities together.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 29''' — Varic is a person mentioned by Horizon and Sola.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — Varic's magic helped loosen the Titan's grip on Raion's mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 34''' — Varic is a wizard whose magic can be crushed by the Behemoth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 37''' — Varic Vallenar is an Archmage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 37''' — Varic Vallenar possesses an amulet on his neck that acts as a shield against plasma bolts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 37''' — Varic Vallenar can summon water that looks like lasers from between his fingers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 43''' — Varic had black-and-white copies of defensive emplacements.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — Varic is a Sixfold Archmage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — Varic has seven versions of himself due to his ritual: five previous lives, the one lived before the ritual, and the one since.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 47''' — Varic used magic borrowed from a World Spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 47''' — Varic uses a staff that spreads life and water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 47''' — Varic can create copies of Sola.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 3''' — Varic Vallenar is the Captain of The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 4''' — Varic is an Archmage of binding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 4''' — Varic Vallenar has silver eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 4''' — Varic is a captain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 8''' — Varic Vallenar is a human Archmage from the family that founded the Vallenar Corporation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 12''' — Varic Vallenar is associated with water and sealing magic signatures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 20''' — Varic's last name is Vallenar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 21''' — Varic claims he has no memories of The Last Horizon and that this is his first life encountering the ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 21''' — Varic claims Horizon remodeled his favorite workshop based on his memories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 21''' — Varic's orange crystal is teardrop-shaped and resembles a kite shield.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 21''' — Varic has attempted to stop a bad ending six times.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 21''' — Varic failed and died in his first five attempts to stop the bad ending.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 22''' — Varic is mentioned by Raion in relation to helping Jak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 22''' — Varic Vallenar possesses a unique magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 35''' — Varic Vallenar has silver hair and eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 35''' — Captain Vallenar is the captain of The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — Varic Vallenar was attacked by Omega at the Magic Tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 45''' — Varic Vallenar has access to high-grade enchanted objects and a powerful staff.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 45''' — Varic Vallenar would try to seal Starhammer away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 45''' — Varic Vallenar is a wizard who saved Starhammer's home over a year ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 45''' — Varic Vallenar carries a gun and a wand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 45''' — Varic Vallenar wears a blue hood and a shining holographic mask.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 46''' — Varic Vallenar previously called himself Spellbinder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 46''' — Varic is an Archmage of the Cosmic Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Captain Vallenar is addressed by Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 48''' — Varic is fighting Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 50''' — Shyrax has not allowed Varic Vallenar to die.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 51''' — Varic Vallenar is a prisoner wearing a white jumpsuit and enchanted golden manacles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 51''' — Varic Vallenar has regained his magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 51''' — Varic Vallenar is wearing orichalcum manacles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 51''' — Varic Vallenar claims to only be able to use basic Aether manipulation.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 6''' — Varic is a hooded figure with silver eyes and a wizard's mantle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 6''' — Varic can use incantations to toss golden magic circles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 6''' — Varic's golden magic circle allows a user to see gold lights indicating survivors in a colony section.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — Varic is a character addressed by Doctor Cryce.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 13''' — The narrator is addressed as Captain Vallenar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 16''' — Varic is a wizard who uses a mantle for protection.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 17''' — Varic is a character Raion mentions to Ryzer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 18''' — Varic's voice came into Sola's helmet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 21''' — Varic is the son of Benri Vallenar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 29''' — Varic Vallenar wears an azure wizard’s mantle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 29''' — Varic Vallenar possesses an ocular implant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 41''' — Varic has three eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 41''' — Varic uses a wand and magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — Varic is Raion's best friend from another life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — Varic sent video of Raion's fight into the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 45''' — Vallenar is a corporation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 45''' — Benri's surname is Vallenar.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 1''' — Varic Vallenar is the Captain and an Archmage of sealing and binding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — Varic is someone who has turned the galaxy against himself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — Varic is Benri's son and is described as the most formidable wizard in the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 4''' — The Vice Chief recognizes the narrator as Captain Vallenar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 5''' — Varic attempted to track Benri to Fathom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 6''' — Captain Vallenar provides lessons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Varic attempted to duplicate Aila's gun and combat armor using a spell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — The Captain's name is Vallenar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — Varic was forcibly delayed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 22''' — Varic is a master of the Mirror of Silence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 22''' — Captain Vallenar may be unwilling to cooperate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — Varic is the Captain of The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — Varic has a mantle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — Varic has an amulet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — Varic has a Lightcaster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — Union representatives decried the actions of Captain Varic Vallenar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — Sealing magic is Professor Vallenar's specialty.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — Professor Vallenar is addressed by Director Porellus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — Varic Vallenar is a person who can appear in homes without warning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Varic is a Captain who orders attacks on the Zenith Blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — Varic is associated with the God’s Eye ritual.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — Sola looks forward to seeing Varic suffer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — Varic is a character who spoke about Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 34''' — Students of Varic Vallenar had their security status flagged following public revelations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Benri has a contact for Varic on his console.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — Varic Vallenar has silver eyes that shine with a cold light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — Aila Escalon entered Varic's private world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 46''' — Varic placed spells to protect Raion's mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — Varic might have a spell he hasn't shared.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
